industries.hero_desc: We understand unique challenges in every industry. Chatura delivers multi-disciplinary solutions to help your business adapt and grow competitively.
industries.overview_desc_1: Indonesia's energy and natural resources sector is at a critical transformation point. The transition to clean energy and global sustainability demands force companies to fundamentally overhaul their operational and financial strategies.
industries.overview_desc_2: Chatura combines deep industry expertise with commercial insight to guide safe investments, efficient capital structuring, and regulatory risk mitigation.
industries.challenge_1: Global commodity market volatility and cash flow uncertainty.
industries.challenge_2: Strict domestic regulatory adjustments related to decarbonization targets.
industries.challenge_3: Need for large-scale capital restructuring for green transition projects.
industries.solution_1: Full M&A and joint venture advisory in the mining & energy sector.
industries.solution_2: Optimal structuring of large-scale project financing.
industries.solution_3: Green tax incentive optimization and transfer pricing compliance.
industries.case_desc: Chatura acted as exclusive financial advisor in the 100% share acquisition transaction of a mining infrastructure services company. We guided the transaction structure from comprehensive financial due diligence through to minimizing post-acquisition tax exposure.
industries.engagement_1: 200MW Solar Power Plant Funding in Eastern Indonesia (USD 120M)
industries.insight_1_title: Global Energy Transition Impacts on Indonesian Mining Corporate Valuation
industries.insight_1_desc: A comprehensive guide to corporate portfolio restructuring in the face of the latest domestic carbon regulations.

industries.insight_2_desc: Analysis of import duty incentives and tax allowances to accelerate national energy mix targets.
industries.insight_3_title: LNG Market Outlook: Strategic Commercial Opportunities for Domestic Infrastructure
industries.insight_3_desc: Examining the potential of corporate consolidation schemes in meeting surging domestic gas industry supply chains.

join.hero_desc: A place where legal, tax, financial, and strategic professionals come together to shape the future of business advisory in Indonesia.
join.value_1_desc: Accelerate your career with real work challenges, continuous learning, and exposure to high-impact cross-border engagements.
join.value_2_desc: Work alongside experts from various multi-disciplinary functions within our integrated advisory practice.
join.value_3_desc: Help our clients navigate critical decisions and shape sustainable long-term business growth.
join.story_1_text: "Working at Chatura transformed my career trajectory. The exposure to cross-border engagements gave me confidence I never knew I had."
join.story_2_text: "The mentorship from senior partners accelerated my growth. Within 18 months, I was leading my own client engagements."
join.story_3_text: "The collaborative culture here is genuine. Every team member genuinely wants to see you succeed and grow professionally."

contact.hero_desc: Our specialist team is ready to help you navigate regulatory complexity and achieve sustainable business growth.
contact.office_address: Wisma 46, 38th Floor, Jl. Jend. Sudirman Kav. 1, Jakarta 10220, Indonesia
contact.form_desc: Please complete the form below for an initial structured consultation.
contact.form_detail_placeholder: Briefly describe the challenge or needs you would like to address...
contact.form_privacy: I agree that the information I submit will be managed in accordance with Chatura Indonesia's applicable data privacy regulations.
contact.faq_1_q: How long is the response time after the form is submitted?
contact.faq_1_a: Our consulting team is committed to reviewing and responding to your message within 24 business hours of form submission.
contact.faq_2_q: Is the initial discussion regarding corporate needs confidential?
contact.faq_2_a: Absolutely. All business information, financial data, and M&A structuring discussed with our advisors are treated with strict confidentiality under our Non-Disclosure Agreement framework.
contact.faq_3_q: How do I schedule an in-person meeting at the Chatura office?
contact.faq_3_a: You can select your preferred schedule through the email confirmation response from this form, or contact our corporate assistant directly via the floating WhatsApp button at the bottom right of the page.
transfer.hero_desc: Integrated M&A platform for asset acquisition, entity divestiture, strategic investor matching, and safe family business succession across Indonesia.
transfer.how_title: Secure Steps for Business Asset Transactions
transfer.step_1_desc: Prospective buyers and sellers register their legal entities for KYC (Know Your Customer) screening and strict financial compliance by Chatura.
transfer.step_2_desc: After approval, investors gain full access to Information Memorandums and detailed financial metrics (Revenue, EBITDA) within the verified database.
transfer.step_3_desc: Chatura's expert corporate advisory team fully manages deal negotiation, financial audit (Due Diligence), tax structuring, through to transaction deed signing.
transfer.buyer_db_desc: In line with global M&A privacy compliance, you must log in or be registered in Chatura's Buyer Database before accessing all listing offerings.
transfer.cta_title: Looking to Sell a Business or Find Strategic Investors?
transfer.cta_desc: Contact our Corporate Valuation & Financial Advisory team directly and confidentially for an accurate commercial entity valuation.
transfer.login_remember: Remember my account on this device
